Jiang Yan и”Је»¶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Yan (и”Је»¶). Warned Zhuge Ke not to attack Wei due to white mist and was stripped of rank. Jiang Yan may not have existed in history. Jiang Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
